text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm walking around the campus...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Dang it! I can't... reach!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is repeatedly jumping and grabbing
at a flyer that's caught on a tree branch.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What are you looking at? Don't you have better
things to do than stare at people like a weirdo?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Are you mocking me or something? I got
this, so just leave me alone.
choice_data_list: At least let me cheer you on!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Are you mocking me or something? I got
this, so just leave me alone.
choice_data_list: At least let me cheer you on!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Shut up! I don't need any of that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shuts down every offer I make, so I resort to
secretly watching over her to make sure she
doesn't injure herself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm going to get this thing no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her unparalleled stamina, Narita
Taishin continues to jump at the flyer for what
seems like forever until at last...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: HAH! Gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, victory at last. Am I good, or what?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This just goes to show that you can reach any
goal as long as you never give up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You're so annoying! I never asked you for help,
did I?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Whatever! Fine!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I don't have the energy to deal with you. If you
want to help, then hurry up and do something!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we look for things to stand on so we
can pull down the branches and reach the flyer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All right, I should be able to get it now... Hup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her powerful legs, we're finally able to
get the flyer down!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. That was too much work for what it's worth...
But...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You were more helpful than I thought you'd be. I
was sure you'd be useless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are so many things I can learn from the way
Narita Taishin utilizes her body, especially her leg
strength.
